name: cyberos
description: Turn an idea, PRD, or spec into audited feature requests, then ship them under a governed workflow. /create-feature-requests drafts FRs and audits them into the backlog; /ship-feature-requests drives each one through implement -> review -> test -> done, with the human holding the two acceptance gates. /init installs the machine into any repo; /update, /changelog and /help keep it current. Agents never push, merge, deploy, or self-accept.
